name: Baked Rice with Green Chilies and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked and cooled rice with the sour cream, mixing well.
2. Spread half of the rice mixture in a buttered 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
3. Sprinkle half of the shredded cheddar cheese on top.
4. Add a layer of diced green chilies.
5. Top with the remaining shredded cheese.
6. Spread the remaining rice mixture over the top.
7. Dot the mixture with diced butter and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
